name: performance.four_site_prestaged_active_wait_30m
description: Performance-load row for four active hostile overmap AI sites. One bandit-style site and three separated cannibal_camp sites are pre-staged as already-active persisted stalk jobs with non-player performance targets, then a 30-minute wait measures live cadence cost with all four active jobs. This is load/cost measurement, not natural four-way player-pressure dispatch proof.

steps.label: post_load_four_site_prestaged_perf_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the four-site pre-staged performance fixture; this is startup/load plus fixture footing only

steps.label: preflight_four_site_prestaged_bandit_active_job
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the distinct pre-staged bandit active job needed before the four-site performance-load measurement
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains the distinct bandit stalk job with live/findable active members and a non-player performance target before the measured live cadence starts
steps.failure_rule: If any pre-staged active job, member ids, or target semantics are missing, later timing cannot be credited to the intended four-active-site performance-load row.

steps.label: preflight_four_site_prestaged_cannibal_east_active_job
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the distinct pre-staged cannibal_east active job needed before the four-site performance-load measurement
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains the distinct cannibal_east stalk job with live/findable active members and a non-player performance target before the measured live cadence starts
steps.failure_rule: If any pre-staged active job, member ids, or target semantics are missing, later timing cannot be credited to the intended four-active-site performance-load row.

steps.label: preflight_four_site_prestaged_cannibal_west_active_job
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the distinct pre-staged cannibal_west active job needed before the four-site performance-load measurement
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains the distinct cannibal_west stalk job with live/findable active members and a non-player performance target before the measured live cadence starts
steps.failure_rule: If any pre-staged active job, member ids, or target semantics are missing, later timing cannot be credited to the intended four-active-site performance-load row.

steps.label: preflight_four_site_prestaged_cannibal_north_active_job
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the distinct pre-staged cannibal_north active job needed before the four-site performance-load measurement
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains the distinct cannibal_north stalk job with live/findable active members and a non-player performance target before the measured live cadence starts
steps.failure_rule: If any pre-staged active job, member ids, or target semantics are missing, later timing cannot be credited to the intended four-active-site performance-load row.

steps.label: measure_30_minutes_four_site_prestaged_active
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu for the four-active-site performance-load measurement window
steps.expected_visible_fact: the player waited through a bounded 30-minute overmap AI cadence window after preflight had already established four distinct active hostile-site jobs; performance credit depends on same-run perf artifacts and a green wait ledger
steps.failure_rule: If the measurement wait is interrupted, OCR remains unclassified/yellow, or the artifact delta lacks four-active perf/cadence lines, this row is inconclusive.

steps.label: audit_four_site_prestaged_measurement_artifact
steps.abort_reason: measurement artifact did not contain compact four-active-site perf counters for the pre-staged performance-load row
steps.failure_rule: No four-active-site performance-load row credit if the same-run measurement artifact lacks sites=4 active_sites=4, the full active job mix, signals=0, and total_us.

evidence_contract.claim: four active hostile overmap AI jobs -- one pre-staged non-player-target bandit stalk job and three separated pre-staged non-player-target cannibal stalk jobs -- can advance through a real 30-minute performance-load measurement window with signals=0 while emitting compact timing/counter evidence
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for performance
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No performance-row credit if startup/load, all four saved active-job preflights, bounded measurement wait, green wait ledger, and same-run four-active perf counter lines are not all present and classified separately.
